title: clitoria ternatea var. bracteata
intro: Clitoria ternatea var. bracteata, also known as the blue pea or butterfly pea, is a variant of the Clitoria ternatea plant, a perennial vine native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits associated with Clitoria ternatea var. bracteata include improved cognitive function, reduced stress and anxiety, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Clitoria ternatea var. bracteata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, often consumed for its potential medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
